hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|svelte)$' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+'); BASE=$(basename "$FILE" .ts); DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); TEST="${DIR}/__tests__/${BASE}.test.ts"; [ -f "$TEST" ] && npx vitest run "$TEST" --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -30 || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.bundle\.mjs|pnpm-lock\.yaml|^build/)' && echo 'BLOCK: Generated file. Run npm run build or pnpm install instead.' >&2 && exit 1 || exit 0
